title: C08 spec artifact
description: The version-controlled, human-authored spec-artifact format (C08 §4.1). Faithful to the canonical-track collapse (OQ-1 Reading A): the artifact IS the prompt-template carrier. In v4 the spec lives on disk as agents/<name>/prompt.template.md (Go text/template + Markdown). This JSON form is the stdlib-parseable equivalent: spec_body carries the template text; the other keys carry the logical fields C08 names so downstream components (C09 render+bind, C10 lint, C32/C33 DoD scoring, C39 fix routing) can operate on them.

spec_id.description: C08 §4.1: stable identity for this spec within the pack. Canonically the pack-relative path segment agents/<name> (the path C09 resolve() keys on). REQUIRED.

title.description: Human-readable one-line label for the spec. Convenience field for the binding surface; the canonical identity is spec_id.

intent.description: The human-authored statement of what the spec is for -- the intent the rendered instruction must drive toward. Surfaces C11's 9-field crucible intake into the durable artifact (C08 §2 'authored by C11'). REQUIRED-by-convention authoring surface.

spec_body.description: C08 §4.1: the full Markdown body of the spec. Must be valid Go text/template (INV-2). In this prototype the body is a template string with {{ field }} placeholders bound by C09 (see C09 binding). REQUIRED.

dod.description: C08 §4.1 + INV-4: the free-form Definition-of-Done -- the human-authored statement of what a successful run must satisfy. C33 passes this verbatim to C32's graded judge. Free-form prose at Sweep-2 (per-criterion enumeration is FE-5/deferred, D-15). REQUIRED; absence is E-C08-02.

acceptance_criteria.description: Optional list of acceptance-criteria statements (the lintable surface C10 consumes; C08 AC-4). Free-form prose items at Sweep-2 -- NOT machine-scored per-criterion DoD (FE-5/deferred).

work_type.description: C08 §4.1: optional agent-role slug (e.g. worker, judge, dog) the spec is authored for; informs C09 role binding and C10 lint focus. Conventionally equals the <name> segment of spec_id.

actor.description: C08 §4.1: the actor identity of the spec author/last committer, in the D-29 'kind:id' wire format (e.g. 'human:alice'). Carried via git commit metadata + C41; optional in the artifact body.

pack_ref.description: C08 §4.1: provenance -- which pack repo this spec lives in (repo URL or local path). Needed for C51 gene-transfusion attribution and C39 fix routing. Optional.

git_revision.description: C08 §4.1: the commit SHA of the pack at which this spec was authored. Per C08 this is DERIVED from git history, not stored in the file; included here only as an optional provenance echo. Validator does not require it.
